about.title: About
about.contextFirstParagraph: I'm Akul Ramasubban — a mechanical engineering student at Purdue University focused on intentional design, real-world constraints, and engineering solutions that improve everyday work.
about.contextSecondParagraph: This interactive Windows XP portfolio lets you explore my work through a nostalgic desktop interface.
about.contextThirdParagraph: From designing battery packs for Purdue Electric Racing to building an electric waste-pushcart in Bangalore, I love tackling hands-on engineering challenges.
about.contextFourthParagraph: I've interned at Ford Motor Company, Tredence Inc., and worked as a researcher at Purdue's ARIES Lab and AI Racing team.
about.contextFifthParagraph: Windows XP was the OS I grew up with — this portfolio is a tribute to that era.
about.contextSixthParagraph: This project was built with Vue.js, Pinia, Vue Router, and TailwindCSS.
about.contextSeventhParagraph: I hope you enjoy browsing through my computer!
about.helpFirst: This portfolio is forked from UnMugViolet/portfolio — huge thanks to Paul Jaguin for the original Windows XP concept.
about.helpSecond: Spotify's API powers the music player integration.
about.helpThird: Built with Vite and deployed via GitHub Pages.
about.helpFourth: Windows XP images were sourced from the Internet Archive.
about.helpFifth: Reach me at aramasub{'@'}purdue.edu or connect on LinkedIn.

services.contactMessage: Feel free to contact me to discuss your project and get a personalized quote.

logma.contextFirstParagraph: Purdue Electric Racing (PER) is a student-run team that designs and builds a fully electric race car to compete in Formula SAE Electric.
logma.contextSecondParagraph: As Senior Battery Advisor and Module Project Lead, I designed sleeker busbars to minimize module length using current and resistivity calculations, and increased bend radius on terminal busbars to reduce vertical height.
logma.contextThirdParagraph: I ensured optimal thermal management with TIM thickness analysis and spacer integration for uniform cooling, while developing Simulink-based Simscape models to simulate SOC, heat generation, and cell temperature distribution.
logma.goalFirst: Optimize busbar design for compact and efficient battery modules
logma.goalSecond: Improve terminal busbar bend radius for reduced vertical height
logma.goalThird: Design spacers and thermal interface materials for efficient heat transfer
logma.goalFourth: Develop Simscape battery models for SOC and thermal simulation
logma.goalFifth: Refine cooling solutions using simulation-validated designs
logma.goalSixth: Achieve more compact module, reducing weight and improving assembly

pangaia.contextFirstParagraph: Created a retrofitted waste pushcart with motors and battery to automate the lives of older workers in a local market in India, completed at age 16.
pangaia.contextSecondParagraph: Conducted analysis on road surfaces to calculate motor sizing and battery range requirements, and designed a custom steering rack and overall vehicle design.
pangaia.contextThirdParagraph: Worked under a $2000 budget from the local government to come up with a novel solution that is easily integratable into existing workflows.
pangaia.contextFourthParagraph: The finished prototype was donated to a local waste market for daily use.
pangaia.goalFirst: Build a functional electric pushcart for under $2000
pangaia.goalSecond: Analyze road surfaces for motor sizing and battery range
pangaia.goalThird: Design custom steering rack and overall vehicle layout
pangaia.goalFourth: Integrate motors and battery into existing pushcart frame
pangaia.goalFifth: Donate prototype to local waste market
pangaia.goalSixth: Create easily integratable solution for elderly workers
pangaia.tasksDoneFirst: Road surface analysis and motor sizing
pangaia.CDMText: Electrical system architecture and component layout.

clench.contextFirstParagraph: At Purdue's Autonomous Robotics and Intelligent Embedded Systems (ARIES) Lab, I designed and integrated a multi-axis robotic testbed.
clench.contextSecondParagraph: The testbed implements closed-loop motion control in ROS 2 with encoder feedback and motor drivers using I2C communication.
clench.contextThirdParagraph: I ran experiments with bio-responsive materials that generate electrical output under controlled conditions, translating signals to drive low-power actuation.
clench.contextFourthParagraph: I also built fixtures to characterize material response and developed data-acquisition firmware to condition and analyze biosignals.
clench.goalSecond: Implement closed-loop motion control in ROS 2
clench.goalThird: Integrate encoder feedback and I2C motor drivers
clench.goalSixth: Develop data-acquisition firmware for biosignal analysis

emc2.contextFirstParagraph: As part of Purdue's Vertically Integrated Projects (VIP) program, I work on the AI Racing team developing autonomous drone path-planning algorithms.
emc2.contextSecondParagraph: I implemented the NRHDG optimization algorithm for multi-agent drones operating over dynamic maps in Python.
emc2.contextThirdParagraph: The work involves integrating plant models and LiDAR sensor data in Simulink to enable accurate track mapping.
emc2.contextFourthParagraph: I also created PID control algorithms to support rapid directional changes in drone path-planning simulations.
emc2.goalFirst: Implement NRHDG optimization for multi-agent drones
emc2.goalSecond: Integrate plant models with LiDAR data in Simulink
emc2.goalThird: Create PID control algorithms for path planning
emc2.goalFourth: Enable rapid directional changes in simulations
emc2.goalFifth: Validate algorithms against dynamic map scenarios

aidella.contextFirstParagraph: At Ford Motor Company, I worked on Forward Model Quality as a Product Development Intern.
aidella.contextSecondParagraph: I facilitated Six Sigma root-cause analysis for a faulty fuel-injector tip and implemented supplier containment measures.
aidella.contextThirdParagraph: I also improved the model-based design process using MagicDraw and mapped real-world customer usage to refine test methods.
aidella.goalFourth: Map customer usage to increase in-field quality by 20%
aidella.tasksDoneFirstDetails: Facilitated a 3L5Y panel and coordinated supplier containment to prevent field issues.
aidella.tasksDoneSecondDetails: Used MagicDraw to accelerate DFMEA development for engine systems.
aidella.tasksDoneThirdDetails: Mapped real-world usage patterns and refined test methods for 20% quality improvement.
aidella.tasksDoneFourthDetails: Visited multiple plants (Gemba walks) and redesigned instruction sheets to boost UAW operator efficiency.
aidella.tasksDoneFifthDetails: Supported accelerated fatigue testing to improve part-to-part robustness assessments.
aidella.tasksDoneFifthDetailsSecond: This work directly contributed to quick response capability for NHTSA recall scenarios.

fanny-portfolio.contextFirstParagraph: Designed and built a custom phone-controlled mini-racecar from scratch using 3D printing and off-the-shelf components.
fanny-portfolio.contextSecondParagraph: 3D printed and tested the entire frame with a 5:1 gearing ratio and custom steering configuration with a dual motor setup to improve torque performance.
fanny-portfolio.contextThirdParagraph: Created a custom application on the Blynk portal to allow remote control of servo and motors for accurate steering and power delivery, adapting the entire system to fit within 10 inches for a 65-degree turning radius.
fanny-portfolio.goalFirst: 3D print and test full vehicle frame
fanny-portfolio.goalSecond: Achieve 5:1 gearing ratio for torque optimization
fanny-portfolio.goalThird: Design custom steering config with dual motor setup
fanny-portfolio.goalFourth: Build Blynk app for phone-based remote control
fanny-portfolio.goalFifth: Fit entire car system within 10 inches

homeserver.contextFirstParagraph: At Tredence Inc., I worked as a Data Science Intern analyzing supply chain and retail data for enterprise clients.
homeserver.contextSecondParagraph: I used Python (NumPy, Matplotlib) and SQL to identify sector trends, build regression models, and drive actionable insights.
homeserver.goalFirst: Identify sector trends using Python and data visualization
homeserver.goalSecond: Build multiple regression models for supply chain analysis
homeserver.goalThird: Reduce costs for key customers by 15%
homeserver.goalFourth: Leverage SQL for data cleaning and analysis

clippy.message: It looks like you're enjoying this portfolio! Would you like to support the project?
